title: Combined Solutions
definition: On Combined Solutions, you get to enjoy total employee benefits for both occupational and non-occupational. The cover caters for workman's compensation and comes with Group Life Cover benefits. Combined Solutions also covers both natural and accidental causes that the employee faces while on duty. The cover is suitable for any organisation of a minimum of 5 persons is eligible to have the insurance cover.
benefits: Accidental death Critical Illness Cover Last Expense Cover Permanent and Total Disability Temporary Disability Cover Medical Reimbursement Workman's Compensation
eligibility: Please contact Old Mutual Uganda for detailed eligibility and application requirements.
